title: Beyond Minecraft's End
description: Modpack inspired by Soso no Frieren
body:
# 🌌 Beyond Minecraft’s End  
*A story-rich exploration & magic modpack for Fabric 1.20.1*

> Your story begins where others ended.  
> Rebuild the path to the End—one ruin, one spell, one memory at a time.

---

## 🧭 Overview

**Beyond Minecraft’s End** transforms Minecraft into a quiet, magical journey through forgotten ruins, arcane powers, and meaningful discoveries.  
Inspired by *Frieren: Beyond Journey’s End*, this pack focuses on **progression through exploration**, **spell-based combat**, **handcrafted structures**, and **emergent lore**—perfect for slow-paced adventuring in solo or small SMP (1–2 players).

---

## 🌍 Exploration & World Design

- **Terralith**, **Towns and Towers**, **Structory**, **Explorify** – lush overworld generation with ruins, camps, and secrets
- **YUNG’s Better Strongholds**, **Dungeons Arise**, **Graveyard**, **MrDungeons** – vast and layered structures for mid/late game
- **End Remastered** – locate 12 legendary Eyes scattered across the world to access the End
- **Incendium**, **Nullscape**, and **The Aether** – full custom dimensions
- Exploration tools: **Antique Atlas**, **Explorer's Compass**, **Traveler's Compass**

---

## 🧙 Magic, Progression & Combat

- Modular spell systems via **Spell Engine**, **Spell Pack**, **Arcanus Continuum**
- Buffs and brewcraft from **Extra Alchemy**
- Weapon variety and RPG tiers from **Simply Swords**, **Knight Quest**, **Legacies & Legends**
- Bosses from **Bosses of Mass Destruction**, **Rotten Creatures**, **Mobs of Mythology**
- Player scaling with **Trinkets**, **Accessories**, **Backpacked**

---

## 🎮 Immersion & World Feel

- **Sound Physics Remastered**, **Presence Footsteps**, **Falling Leaves**, **Visuality**, **Effective**, **Wakes**
- Animation & UI mods: **First Person**, **Better Animations**, **PlayerAnimatorAPI**, **Player Emotes**
- HUD, menus and visuals via **FancyMenu**, **Atlas HUD**, **DrippyLoadingScreen**
- World interaction: **CarryOn**, **Comforts**, **Supplementaries**, **Farmer’s Delight**, **Small Ships**

---

## 👥 SMP & QoL Enhancements

- Multiplayer-safe: **Waystones**, **Gravestones**, **Guard Villagers**, **Chat Heads**, **Voice Chat Ready**
- Optimized configurations for 1–2 player servers

---

## ⚙️ Performance & Optimization

- Fabric optimizations:  
  **Sodium**, **Lithium**, **Starlight**, **C2ME**, **FerriteCore**, **Krypton**, **MemoryLeakFix**, **ModernFix**, **ImmediatelyFast**, **Indium**, **DynamicFPS**
- Prepped for chunk pregeneration with **Chunky**  
- Performance monitoring with **SparkWeave**

---

## 🧾 Recommended Settings

- Shader support via **Iris** (Complementary Reimagined / Bliss recommended)
- Dynamic lights: **on**
- Some Eyes and ruins may require long journeys (10k+ blocks) — travel prepared

---

## 🛠️ Optional Additions (coming soon)

- [ ] Lore datapacks with books and world memory
- [ ] In-world maproom mechanics

---

> _Beyond Minecraft’s End_ is not about rushing the dragon.  
> It’s about the quiet before the spell, the book beneath the dust, and the echo of footsteps in places long forgotten.



## ⚠️ Important
This modpack requires Java 21
